utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well , I am just ... if the paste matches the pants , you can make yourself a pair of paste pants and she will not know the difference !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Joey , do you have a minute ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Uh , Rachel here , so good luck man , let me know how it works out .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh , Joey , I have such a problem !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh well , you are timing could not be better . I am putting out fires all over the place .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay . Okay . Okay . Joey , I have got to tell you something !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: What ... what is it , what is it ?

emotion_cause.span: 8_I have got to tell you something !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh my God , it is so huge , but you just have to promise me that you cannot tell anyone .

emotion_cause.span: 10_it is so huge , but you just have to promise me that you cannot tell anyone .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh no , no ... no ... no ... no ! I do not want to know !

emotion_cause.span: 10_it is so huge , but you just have to promise me that you cannot tell anyone .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yes ! Yes ! Yes , you do want to know ! This is unbelievable !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I do not care , Rach ! Look , I am tired of being the guy who knows all the secrets but can not tell anyone !

emotion_cause.span: 13_I am tired of being the guy who knows all the secrets but can not tell anyone !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: What ? What secrets ? You know secrets ? What are they ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: And you are not supposed to be gossiping ! !

emotion_cause.span: 15_you are not supposed to be gossiping ! !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I know , I know ! I just can not keep this one in , so I pick up the phone

emotion_cause.span: 16_I just can not keep this one in

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I am not listening to you !

emotion_cause.span: 16_I just can not keep this one in
